join_order.notes: sub_fk is dense index into sub table; precompute sic_ok[sub_row] bitset, direct lookup via num.sub_fk
Use tag_pk_index for O(1) lookup by (tag_code, version_code); check abstract[tag_row]==0 inline
Use stmt_offsets to get EQ range in pre; build hash set of (sub_fk, tag_code, version_code) from those rows; semi-join since we only need existence

data_structures.pre_eq_hashset: compact_hash_set(key=(uint32_t sub_fk, uint32_t tag_code, uint32_t version_code), pre_sized=1240000)
data_structures.aggregation: compact_hash_map(key=(int16_t sic, uint32_t tag_row), value=(double sum, uint64_t count, robin_hood_set<int32_t> cik_set), pre_sized=500000)

parallelism.notes: Parallel scan of USD range in num; thread-local aggregation maps merged after scan

indexes.purpose: get USD row range to skip non-USD rows
O(1) lookup of tag row by (tag_code, version_code)
get EQ row range in pre to build hash set

step1_prefilter_sub.description: Load sub/sic.bin and sub/cik.bin. Build sic_ok bitset and cache sic/cik arrays.
step1_prefilter_sub.output: sic_ok bitset, sic_val array, cik_val array

step2_build_pre_eq_hashset.description: Use stmt_offsets to find EQ code and get (start,end) range in pre. Load sub_fk, tag_code, version_code for that range. Insert (sub_fk, tag_code, version_code) tuples into hash set.

step3_load_tag.description: mmap tag_pk_index. Load tag/abstract.bin into memory.

step4_parallel_scan_num.description: Use uom_offsets to find USD range. Parallel morsel scan over [usd_start, usd_end). For each row i: (1) check !isnan(value[i]), (2) check sic_ok[sub_fk[i]], (3) lookup tag_pk_index(tag_code[i], version_code[i]) → tag_row, check abstract[tag_row]==0, (4) probe pre_eq_hashset(sub_fk[i], tag_code[i], version_code[i]), (5) if all pass: aggregate into thread-local map keyed by (sic_val[sub_fk[i]], tag_row).

step5_merge_aggregate.description: Merge thread-local maps into global map. Each entry: (sic, tag_row) → (sum_value, count_value, cik_set).

step6_having_and_output.description: Filter groups where cik_set.size() >= 2. Compute avg = sum/count. Decode tlabel from tag table (tlabel_offsets + tlabel_data). stmt is constant 'EQ'. Partial sort (top-500) by total_value DESC. Output limit 500.

aggregation.group_key_notes: p.stmt is constant 'EQ' so excluded from key
